personality: 6 Glass / Luxe DARK (with 7 Dark-First Utility typography fusion)
personality_one_liner: A cinematic, ultra-premium underwater AR HUD combining deep-ocean mystery with sleek, holographic sci-fi gaming interfaces.

spacing.rule: Minimal and deliberate. Large bottom padding (3xl) over the custom HUD tab bar. Use glass overlays instead of raw margin.

do's: Use intense blur (70+) paired with strong base tints for HUD elements.
Apply to custom bottom tab bar, floating mission cards, and AI chat bubbles.
Use on sticky headers over underwater backgrounds.
dont's: Don't stack more than 2 glass surfaces.
Don't blur full screen content behind modals without proper contrast.
Don't use weak blur that allows text behind to be legible.

haptics.NO_TOLERANCE: always have switcher in settings or profile page
haptics.wiring: Haptic calls live inside these components (Button primary, TabBar item, SegmentedControl, FilterChip, switch, slider) they fire automatically on use. Dev agent does NOT wire haptics ad-hoc per screen.

screens.name: Welcome/Auth
screens.purpose: Cinematic introduction to the AR experience with immersive underwater video/image and glass auth forms.

states.loading: Skeleton glass cards over dark ocean background.
states.error: Glass toast with red glow and retry button.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Immersive dashboard with title 'SUMÉRGETE EN LA EXPERIENCIA', quick actions (Explorar océano, Iniciar misión, Mis logros) and a futuristic HUD vibe.

states.loading: Shimmering cyan skeletons for HUD cards.
states.error: Error toast, retry button centered in HUD.

screens.name: Map
screens.purpose: Interactive dark underwater map with 12 real sculpture locations (locked/unlocked) and glowing pins.

states.loading: Full screen skeleton map with scanning line animation.
states.empty: No sculptures found near you. Pan map.
states.error: Failed to load sonar data. Retry connection.

screens.name: Missions
screens.purpose: List of gamified challenges (Ocean Explorer, Marine Guardian) with XP, levels, and progress tracking.

states.loading: List of skeleton cards simulating the mission cards.
states.empty: No active missions. Dive in to start one.

screens.name: AR Experience
screens.purpose: Simulated Apple Vision Pro style underwater AR view identifying real Museo Atlántico sculptures with cyan holographic overlays.

states.empty: No sculptures detected. Point camera at the ocean floor.
states.error: Camera access denied or signal lost.

screens.name: AI Chat
screens.purpose: Holographic ATLANTIS AI assistant for lore and guidance, set against a bioluminescent ocean backdrop.

states.loading: Chat bubble skeletons and glowing AI particle pulse.
states.empty: AI is listening... Ask about the Rubicon.

screens.name: Profile & Rewards
screens.purpose: Gamified player card (Level 7 Ocean Explorer, 1250 XP), badges, and unlockable discounts in a futuristic showcase.

states.loading: Skeleton for profile header and 3D badge grid.

welcome_bg.alt: Wide-angle cinematic shot of the ocean floor, concrete sculptures, cyan particles

map_background.alt: Dark futuristic HUD map of the ocean floor, glowing cyan topographic lines

ar_simulation.alt: First person view underwater with cyan holographic scanning grid overlay on statues

ai_chat_hologram_bg.alt: Dark ocean water, subtle glowing bioluminescent cyan particles, holographic HUD

diver_scuba.alt: Scuba diver with flashlight in the dark water

chip_row.rules: Fixed 36pt height, 56pt row height, horizontal scroll only. Sits outside ScrollView in sticky header. Identical across all screen states (Loading/Empty/Error).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow DARK THEME. This is an ultra premium AAA-game aesthetic.
Borders should act as holographic highlights. Apply `borderStrong` (#00E5FF) to active state borders and glow effects to create a sci-fi HUD feel.
Tab bar MUST be a custom floating HUD style. Use `expo-glass-effect` with `surfaceSecondary` at 70% opacity and a thin `borderStrong` top border.

Screens: Map, AR Experience, and AI Chat must use absolute positioned background images (`map_background`, `ar_simulation`, `ai_chat_hologram_bg`) stretched full screen (`StyleSheet.absoluteFillObject`) to provide the cinematic deep sea base.
Overlays: Every full screen image MUST have a top-to-bottom `expo-linear-gradient` scrim starting at transparent and fading to 80-90% `surfaceInverse` at the bottom to ensure text readability.
Typography: Use SpaceGrotesk for display (titles, levels, headers) and Montserrat for body. Both capped at max weight 500. Let size denote hierarchy.
Data screens (Missions, Profile) MUST implement the required Loading skeleton (animated shimmer over `surfaceTertiary` boxes), Empty state (Icon + message), and Error state.
Always provide a Top Filter/Category Chip Row in list screens (like Missions or Map Filters) using the rigid 36pt height constraint, rendered outside the ScrollView.
Implement the global Haptics toggle in the Profile or Settings, wrapping the `expo-haptics` triggers.
